final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original marketing hero image for a gaming smartphone e-commerce campaign on JD.com digital channel.

Style/medium: photorealistic product photography with cyberpunk aesthetic, gaming hardware editorial in the spirit of Razer product launches
Composition: 45-degree floating angle, dynamic three-quarter view showing front and side, wide-angle lens with slight perspective distortion for speed sensation
Subject: gaming smartphone with aggressive angular design, visible RGB lighting strips along edges, reflective glass back panel, screen displaying game UI
Scene/backdrop: cyberpunk neon cityscape at night, blurred skyscrapers with holographic billboards, light trails suggesting motion, atmospheric haze
Lighting/mood: dramatic rim lighting from below with cyan and magenta neon glow, high contrast, futuristic and energetic mood
Color palette: deep black base, electric cyan and hot magenta as primary accents, subtle purple gradients, white highlights
Materials/textures: brushed aluminum frame, glossy tempered glass, matte rubberized grip zones, visible heat dissipation vents
Avoid: generic stock phone renders, washed-out colors, cluttered background, 8K stuffer text, plastic-looking materials, static flat presentation
